; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-05-06T23:17:34Z
;
; Requires: https://github.com/rmitchellscott/rm-librarian
;           https://github.com/rmitchellscott/rm-pdfium
;           https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions/xovi-message-broker
;           https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions/qt-command-executor

AFFECT [[96546182596996012]]
    TRAVERSE [[15740235823693067624]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            signal extractPagesClicked
        }

        TRAVERSE [[14125623155555875541]]
            LOCATE AFTER [[425121728314878811.432643201877711221]]#[[15624594267422939347]]
            INSERT {
                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&432643201877711221&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: extractPagesItem
                    ~&8399878573055752961&~: "extractPagesItem"
                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("New document from pages")
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"7424592205469683787&~
                    ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&6504254477&~.extractPagesClicked()
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11797611520953530268]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.CommandExecutor [[180922.180921]]

    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]#[[496312708941723703]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[428051690305612204]][.[[7083194890448]]=[[7712934851008712]]]
        INSERT {
            CommandExecutor {
                ~&5972374&~: _extractCmdExecutor
            }

            ~&214604601930&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _extractRescanTimer
                property ~&7083178290016&~ pendingUuid: ""
                ~&7713147298280334&~: 100
                ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                    _extractCmdExecutor.executeCommand("sh", ["-c", "{ echo '>erescanLibrary:' > /run/xovi-mb; cat /run/xovi-mb-out > /dev/null; } &"]);
                    ~&5972376&~ (pendingUuid) {
                        _extractRenamePoller.uuid = pendingUuid;
                        _extractRenamePoller.retries = 0;
                        _extractRenamePoller.~&214641748151&~();
                        pendingUuid = "";
                    }
                }
            }

            ~&214604601930&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _extractRenamePoller
                property ~&7083178290016&~ uuid: ""
                property ~&197088788&~ retries: 0
                ~&7713147298280334&~: 200
                ~&7083121289162&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                    retries++;
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&214624950331&~ = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(uuid);
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&214624950331&~ || retries > 15) {
                        ~&6504295855&~();
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&214624950331&~) {
                            ~&2766288418351025740&~.~&6504147419&~(~&"3066108563060590839&~, { ~&5972374&~: uuid });
                        }
                        uuid = "";
                        retries = 0;
                    }
                }
            }

            readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ _extractXochitlBase: "/home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/"

            function _extractRunCmd(cmd, ~&6503646550&~) {
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6502785411&~.parse(_extractCmdExecutor.executeCommand(cmd, ~&6503646550&~));
            }

            function extractPagesAction() {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&5528987290049822124&~.~&233731876535476&~) ~&7083121450889&~;

                ~&197102514&~ ~&214623780460&~ = ~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~;
                ~&197102514&~ indices = ~&5528987290049822124&~.~&214637513689&~.~&214641468857&~();
                ~&197102514&~ ~&7713428759880064&~ = String(~&233694067165438&~.~&5545873225921991060&~(~&214623780460&~));
                ~&197102514&~ docName = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&214623780460&~).~&505890565057603928&~;

                ~&5528987290049822124&~.~&214622489712&~();
                ~&7713147298271622&~.~&14346254351602452697&~ = ~&14760974072997390826&~.~&17423013528779673785&~.~&233683583034446&~;

                ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                    ~&197102514&~ newUuid = _extractPagesToNewDocument(~&214623780460&~, indices, ~&7713428759880064&~, docName);
                    ~&5972376&~ (newUuid) {
                        _extractRescanTimer.pendingUuid = newUuid;
                        ~&14825814810595278773&~.~&233726567442689&~({
                            ~&"6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Created new document from %n page(s)", "", indices.~&7082886407723&~),
                            ~&"214641774074&~: ~&14681940438292154192&~.~&254502514718671153&~
                        });
                    } ~&6503784146&~ {
                        ~&14825814810595278773&~.~&233726567442689&~({
                            ~&"6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Failed to create document from pages")
                        });
                    }
                });
            }

            function _extractPagesToNewDocument(~&214623780460&~, indices, ~&7713428759880064&~, docName) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&6503664356&~ = _extractXochitlBase;
                ~&197102514&~ contentStr = _extractRunCmd("cat", [~&6503664356&~ + ~&214623780460&~ + ".content"]).stdout;
                ~&5972376&~ (!contentStr) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ ~&233724020048228&~;
                try { ~&233724020048228&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(contentStr); } catch(~&180974&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~; }

                ~&197102514&~ useCPages = !!(~&233724020048228&~.cPages && ~&233724020048228&~.cPages.~&214637513689&~);
                ~&197102514&~ useFlat = !useCPages && ~&214582398184&~.~&233731871973028&~(~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~);
                ~&5972376&~ (!useCPages && !useFlat) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ ~&7712803429185970&~ = useCPages ? ~&233724020048228&~.cPages.~&214637513689&~ : ~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~;
                ~&197102514&~ selectedPages = [];
                ~&197102514&~ selectedIndices = [];
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < indices.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indices[~&180978&~];
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ >= 0 && ~&197088462&~ < ~&7712803429185970&~.~&7082886407723&~) {
                        selectedPages.~&6504189257&~(~&7712803429185970&~[~&197088462&~]);
                        selectedIndices.~&6504189257&~(~&197088462&~);
                    }
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (selectedPages.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ _pageId = function(~&6504167078&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ useCPages ? ~&6504167078&~.~&5972374&~ : ~&6504167078&~; };

                ~&197102514&~ ~&214624950331&~ = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&214623780460&~);
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&214624950331&~) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&233731876138901&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&7713012671454059&~ === ~&7711571060833448&~.~&214586564057&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&214629834015&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&7713012671454059&~ === ~&7711571060833448&~.~&197061219&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&8399622833342374598&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&7713012671454059&~ === ~&7711571060833448&~.~&7711997891205770&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&233731876138901&~ && !~&214629834015&~ && !~&8399622833342374598&~) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ newUuid = _extractRunCmd("cat", ["/proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid"]).stdout.~&6504329413&~();
                ~&5972376&~ (!newUuid) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
                ~&197102514&~ newBase = ~&6503664356&~ + newUuid;

                ~&197102514&~ docDir = ~&6503664356&~ + ~&214623780460&~ + ~&"180920&~;
                ~&197102514&~ selectedIdSet = {};
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = 0; ~&180988&~ < selectedPages.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180988&~++) {
                    selectedIdSet[_pageId(selectedPages[~&180988&~])] = ~&6504329801&~;
                }

                ~&197102514&~ hasPdf = ~&214629834015&~ || ~&233731876138901&~;
                ~&197102514&~ pdfTrimmed = ~&214625660372&~;
                ~&197102514&~ pdfPageMap = {};

                ~&5972376&~ (hasPdf) {
                    ~&197102514&~ pdfPageIndices = [];
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ pi = 0; pi < selectedPages.~&7082886407723&~; pi++) {
                        ~&197102514&~ origPdfIdx;
                        ~&5972376&~ (useCPages) {
                            ~&197102514&~ pg = selectedPages[pi];
                            origPdfIdx = (pg.redir && pg.redir.~&214644635174&~ !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && pg.redir.~&214644635174&~ >= 0) ? pg.redir.~&214644635174&~ : -1;
                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&197102514&~ rd = ~&233724020048228&~.~&16969906412901305596&~ || [];
                            ~&197102514&~ oi = selectedIndices[pi];
                            origPdfIdx = rd[oi] !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? rd[oi] : oi;
                        }
                        ~&5972376&~ (origPdfIdx >= 0 && pdfPageMap[origPdfIdx] === ~&254550717068498203&~) {
                            pdfPageMap[origPdfIdx] = pdfPageIndices.~&7082886407723&~;
                            pdfPageIndices.~&6504189257&~(origPdfIdx);
                        }
                    }

                    ~&5972376&~ (pdfPageIndices.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
                        ~&197102514&~ pageRange = pdfPageIndices.~&197092711&~(function(~&180978&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180978&~ + 1; }).join(~&"180917&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ trimResult = _extractRunCmd("sh", ["-c",
                            "echo '>etrimPdf:" + ~&6503664356&~ + ~&214623780460&~ + ".pdf," + newBase + ".pdf," + pageRange + "' > /run/xovi-mb; cat /run/xovi-mb-out"]).stdout.~&6504329413&~();
                        pdfTrimmed = (trimResult === ~&"5972579&~);
                    }

                    ~&5972376&~ (!pdfTrimmed) {
                        _extractRunCmd("cp", [~&6503664356&~ + ~&214623780460&~ + ".pdf", newBase + ".pdf"]);
                    }
                }

                ~&197102514&~ cpCmd = "mkdir -p '" + newBase + "'";
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180970&~ = 0; ~&180970&~ < selectedPages.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180970&~++) {
                    ~&197102514&~ apId = _pageId(selectedPages[~&180970&~]);
                    cpCmd += "; cp '" + docDir + apId + ".rm' '" + newBase + ~&"180920&~ + apId + ".rm' 2>/dev/null";
                    cpCmd += "; cp '" + docDir + apId + "-metadata.json' '" + newBase + ~&"180920&~ + apId + "-metadata.json' 2>/dev/null";
                }
                _extractRunCmd("sh", ["-c", cpCmd + "; true"]);

                ~&197102514&~ newContent;
                ~&5972376&~ (useCPages) {
                    newContent = ~&6502785411&~.parse(~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(~&233724020048228&~));
                    newContent.~&254543134818768527&~ = selectedPages.~&7082886407723&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&233731876138901&~) newContent.~&7713012671454059&~ = ~&"197096067&~;
                    ~&197102514&~ cpPages = [];
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ci = 0; ci < selectedPages.~&7082886407723&~; ci++) {
                        ~&197102514&~ cp = ~&6502785411&~.parse(~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(selectedPages[ci]));
                        ~&5972376&~ (pdfTrimmed && cp.redir && cp.redir.~&214644635174&~ !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && cp.redir.~&214644635174&~ >= 0) {
                            cp.redir.~&214644635174&~ = pdfPageMap[cp.redir.~&214644635174&~];
                        }
                        cpPages.~&6504189257&~(cp);
                    }
                    newContent.cPages.~&214637513689&~ = cpPages;
                    ~&5972376&~ (newContent.cPages.original) {
                        newContent.cPages.original.~&214644635174&~ = pdfTrimmed ? ~&7081747777088&~.~&6503992357&~(pdfPageMap).~&7082886407723&~ : newContent.cPages.original.~&214644635174&~;
                    }
                    ~&5972376&~ (newContent.cPages.~&8399738334345324088&~ && cpPages.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
                        newContent.cPages.~&8399738334345324088&~.~&214644635174&~ = cpPages[0].~&5972374&~;
                    }
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&233731876138901&~) newContent.~&7713872915752115&~ = ~&"481385828095874600&~;
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    ~&197102514&~ redir = ~&233724020048228&~.~&16969906412901305596&~ || [];
                    ~&197102514&~ cPagesArr = [];
                    ~&197102514&~ pdfCount = 0;
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ fi = 0; fi < selectedIndices.~&7082886407723&~; fi++) {
                        ~&197102514&~ origIdx = selectedIndices[fi];
                        ~&197102514&~ origRedir = redir[origIdx] !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? redir[origIdx] : origIdx;
                        ~&197102514&~ newRedir;
                        ~&5972376&~ (pdfTrimmed && origRedir >= 0) {
                            newRedir = pdfPageMap[origRedir];
                            pdfCount++;
                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                            newRedir = origRedir;
                        }
                        cPagesArr.~&6504189257&~({
                            ~&"5972374&~: selectedPages[fi],
                            ~&"197088462&~: { "timestamp": "1:2", ~&"214644635174&~: ~&"180971&~ + String.fromCharCode(97 + fi) },
                            "redir": { "timestamp": "1:2", ~&"214644635174&~: newRedir }
                        });
                    }
                    ~&197102514&~ newSizeInBytes = ~&"180921&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (hasPdf) {
                        newSizeInBytes = _extractRunCmd("sh", ["-c", "wc -c < '" + newBase + ".pdf'"]).stdout.~&6504329413&~() || ~&"180921&~;
                    }
                    newContent = {
                        "cPages": {
                            ~&"8399738334345324088&~: { "timestamp": "1:1", ~&"214644635174&~: cPagesArr[0].~&5972374&~ },
                            "original": { "timestamp": "1:1", ~&"214644635174&~: hasPdf ? (pdfTrimmed ? ~&7081747777088&~.~&6503992357&~(pdfPageMap).~&7082886407723&~ : ~&7712803429185970&~.~&7082886407723&~) : -1 },
                            ~&"214637513689&~: cPagesArr
                        },
                        ~&"9368934380046331502&~: 0,
                        "documentMetadata": ~&233724020048228&~.documentMetadata || {},
                        "extraMetadata": ~&233724020048228&~.extraMetadata || {},
                        ~&"7713012671454059&~: ~&8399622833342374598&~ ? ~&"7713361681381034&~ : ~&"197096067&~,
                        ~&"7713020516079617&~: "",
                        "formatVersion": 2,
                        ~&"8399749352863178954&~: -1,
                        ~&"233736391113274&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&233736391113274&~ || 125,
                        ~&"495572996767745525&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&495572996767745525&~ || ~&"7713446858344574&~,
                        ~&"254543134818768527&~: selectedPages.~&7082886407723&~,
                        ~&"7713428328436693&~: [],
                        ~&"501305470239996418&~: newSizeInBytes,
                        ~&"6504310840&~: [],
                        ~&"12429421770122822733&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&12429421770122822733&~ || "justify",
                        ~&"254548953487521398&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&254548953487521398&~ || 1,
                        ~&"7713872915752115&~: ~&233731876138901&~ ? ~&"481385828095874600&~ : (~&233724020048228&~.~&7713872915752115&~ || "bestFit")
                    };
                }

                ~&197102514&~ contentJson = ~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(newContent, ~&6504117156&~, 4);
                _extractRunCmd("sh", ["-c",
                    "cat > '" + newBase + ".content' << 'CONTENTEOF'\n" + contentJson + "\nCONTENTEOF"]);

                ~&197102514&~ ~&505890565057603928&~ = docName + " - Pages";
                ~&197102514&~ now = String(~&6502586279&~.now());
                ~&197102514&~ metadataObj = {
                    ~&"477188260000511888&~: now,
                    ~&"16176729529256507806&~: now,
                    ~&"8399738334345324088&~: ~&"180921&~,
                    ~&"18264705319832144597&~: 0,
                    "new": ~&214625660372&~,
                    ~&"7083038346995&~: ~&7713428759880064&~,
                    "pinned": ~&214625660372&~,
                    ~&"7083172477658&~: "",
                    ~&"6504337259&~: "DocumentType",
                    ~&"505890565057603928&~: ~&505890565057603928&~
                };
                ~&197102514&~ metadataJson = ~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(metadataObj, ~&6504117156&~, 4);
                _extractRunCmd("sh", ["-c",
                    "cat > '" + newBase + ".metadata' << 'METAEOF'\n" + metadataJson + "\nMETAEOF"]);

                _extractRescanTimer.~&214641748151&~();
                ~&7083121450889&~ newUuid;
            }
        }

        TRAVERSE [[254480451320573660]]#[[492383210179656089]]
            TRAVERSE [[16215904129796285897]]
                LOCATE AFTER ALL
                INSERT {
                    onExtractPagesClicked: {
                        ~&496312708941723703&~.extractPagesAction();
                    }
                }
            END TRAVERSE
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
